title: Payload of live and draft
excerpt: Is there a way to send a payload from the workflow block that allows me to see if it is currently in draft or live? I want to create a development and a production environment and this would be very helpful to differenti…

posts.author: code (oh)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to send a payload from the workflow block that allows me to see if it is currently in draft or live? I want to create a development and a production environment and this would be very helpful to differentiate the two.
